entries.description: A thorough insight into the history of a concept that I’ve yet to get a good grasp of.
entries.title: Money: The True Story of a Made-Up Thing
entries.subtitle: Jacob GoldStein

entries.description: A great collection of arguments along with and historical context as to why we can be optimistic about humanity in the future. The author does a great job on decomposing prosperity and suggests several concrete pathways for progress.
entries.title: The Rational Optimist
entries.subtitle: Matt Ridley
